name: Demo lifecycle docs reflect real bun demo behavior
motivation: Operators and contributors are using stale or partially incorrect lifecycle notes for the local Kubernetes demo, which causes confusion around readiness checks, clean-room behavior, and environment differences.
intended_experience: When a developer runs bun demo and reads the lifecycle documentation, the described startup, teardown, readiness checks, and watch-mode actions match the real script behavior exactly.
constraints: Keep existing Plan and issue formatting rules.
Do not change production runtime behavior as part of doc-alignment work.
Ensure terminology stays consistent with k3d and ingress naming used in the repo.
